rules.name: non-null-assertion
rules.message: Non-null assertion (!!) — risks NullPointerException at runtime.
rules.fix_hint: Replace !! with safe call (?.) or Elvis operator (?:).

rules.name: blocking-calls
rules.fix_hint: Use delay() for suspending or withContext(Dispatchers.IO) for blocking I/O.

rules.name: thread-executor-usage
rules.message: Thread/Executor usage — prefer structured concurrency with coroutines.
rules.fix_hint: Use launch, async, or withContext instead of raw threads and executors.

rules.name: hardcoded-credentials
rules.fix_hint: Move secrets to environment variables or a vault; reference via config properties.

rules.name: console-output
rules.message: Console output — use a structured logger instead.
rules.fix_hint: Replace with logger.info/debug/warn from SLF4J or kotlin-logging.

rules.name: generic-exception
rules.message: Generic exception thrown — use domain-specific exception types.
rules.fix_hint: Define a sealed hierarchy of domain exceptions and throw the specific subtype.

rules.name: deep-nesting
rules.message: Deep nesting detected (4+ indent levels) — reduces readability.
rules.fix_hint: Extract inner logic into named functions or use early returns / guard clauses.

rules.name: magic-numbers
rules.message: Magic number in comparison — extract to a named constant for clarity.
rules.fix_hint: Define a const val or companion object constant with a descriptive name.

rules.name: abbreviated-names
rules.message: Abbreviated identifier name — prefer descriptive names.
rules.fix_hint: Rename to a descriptive name that conveys intent (exception: i, x, y in lambdas).

rules.name: java-thread-instead-of-coroutine
rules.message: Java threading API used — prefer Kotlin coroutines for structured concurrency and cancellation support.
rules.fix_hint: Replace Thread/ExecutorService with coroutineScope + launch/async. Replace CompletableFuture with suspend functions.

rules.name: api-key-exposure
rules.message: Possible API key or access token in source code
rules.fix_hint: Move to environment variables or a secrets vault. Never commit secrets.

rules.name: private-key-block
rules.message: Private key detected in source code
rules.fix_hint: Remove private key from source. Use key management service or environment variable.

rules.name: connection-string-credentials
rules.message: Connection string with embedded credentials detected
rules.fix_hint: Use environment variables for connection strings. Never embed passwords in URIs.

rules.name: email-in-source
rules.message: Email address detected in source — verify this is not PII
rules.fix_hint: If this is a real email address, consider moving to configuration. Test fixtures should use @example.com.

rules.name: ai-hardcoded-jwt
rules.message: Hardcoded JWT token detected -- AI generators often embed sample tokens that may be valid
rules.fix_hint: Remove hardcoded JWT. Load tokens from environment variables or secret managers at runtime.

rules.name: ai-cors-wildcard
rules.message: CORS wildcard origin (*) -- AI generators default to permissive CORS from tutorial code
rules.fix_hint: Restrict CORS to specific allowed origins. Use environment-based origin configuration.

rules.name: ai-verbose-error-response
rules.message: Error object sent directly in response -- may expose internal details to clients
rules.fix_hint: Return a generic error message to the client. Log the full error server-side.

rules.name: ai-query-in-loop
rules.message: Repository/DAO call inside a loop -- likely N+1 query pattern
rules.fix_hint: Batch the operation: use findAllById(), IN clause, or a JOIN query instead of per-item fetches.

rules.name: ai-shared-mutable-list
rules.message: Mutable collection as instance field -- verify thread safety if accessed concurrently
rules.fix_hint: Use ConcurrentHashMap, CopyOnWriteArrayList, or Collections.synchronized* wrapper. Consider making immutable and using copy-on-write.

file_size._note: Lines of code. Use case implementations should be small and focused; tests get more room.

function_size._note: Detected via awk brace-counting, not grep.

boundaries.name: No framework or persistence imports in domain
boundaries._note: Matches domain directories across architectures: hexagonal (core/domain/), clean (domain/model/), layered (domain/). Architecture-specific boundary checks are handled by fg-410-code-reviewer agent (Layer 3).
boundaries.message: Domain model must remain framework-free — use port interfaces and pure Kotlin types.
